rules.title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr, with limit on monetary assets
rules.failReason: fun i => if (i.net_tangible_assets.length != 3) then "Need 3 full-year net tangible assets figures." else if (i.monetary_asset_ratio >= 50) then "Monetary assets exceed 50% of net tangible assets.", remedy? := some "Ensure net tangible assets are greater than ₹3 cr, calculated on restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), with monetary assets not exceeding 50%."

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: fun i => if (i.operating_profits.length != 3) then "Need 3 full-year operating profit figures." else "Operating profit below ₹15 cr in one or more of the preceding three years.", remedy? := some "Demonstrate an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years."

rules.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: fun i => if (i.net_worths.length != 3) then "Need 3 full-year net worth figures." else "Net worth below ₹1 cr in one or more of the preceding three years.", remedy? := some "Ensure a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis."

rules.title: Application for in-principle approval
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No application for in-principle approval from stock exchange(s) found."

rules.title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No agreement with depository for dematerialisation of specified securities found."

rules.title: Dematerialised form of promoter's securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoters' specified securities not in dematerialised form."

rules.title: Fully paid-up equity shares or forfeiture
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Existing partly paid-up equity shares not fully paid-up or forfeited."

rules.title: Firm arrangements of finance
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No firm arrangements of finance for 75% of the project's funding."

rules.title: Minimum holding period for equity shares offered for sale
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Equity shares offered for sale not held for at least one year."

rules.title: Holding period for convertible securities and resulting equity shares
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Convertible securities and resulting equity shares not held for at least one year."

rules.title: Max sale of equity shares for unidentified targets
rules.failReason:
fun i => "The maximum sale of equity shares for unidentified acquisition or investment targets exceeds 25%.",
    remedy? := some "Limit the amount raised for such objects to not more than 25%."

rules.title: Exceptions to max sale of equity shares
rules.check:
fun _ => True, -- No clear condition in the text; a conservative predicate is used.
    failReason := fun _ => "The proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has not been identified and suitable specific disclosures have not been made."
rules.failReason: fun _ => "The proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has not been identified and suitable specific disclosures have not been made."

rules.title: Additional conditions for conversion of compulsorily convertible securities
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.convertibles_issued_from_revaluation then "Convertible securities are issued by utilization of revaluation reserves." else if i.convertibles_issued_from_unrealized_profits then "Convertible securities are issued by utilization of unrealized profits." else "Not applicable.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure that convertible securities are not issued out of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits."

rules.title: Issuer may issue CDI without prior equity IPO
rules.failReason: fun i => "The issuer is in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public for a period of more than six months."

rules.title: Credit rating required for CDI offer
rules.failReason: fun i => "The issuer has not obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency."

rules.title: Default payment of interest or repayment of principal
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer is in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for a period of more than six months.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Credit rating and debenture trustee requirements
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer has not obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency or has not appointed a debenture trustee.", remedy? := some "Obtain credit rating and appoint a debenture trustee."

rules.title: Debenture redemption reserve
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer has not created a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder."

rules.title: Consent for conversion of convertible debt instruments
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer has not obtained positive consent from holders for the conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares."

rules.title: Option to not convert convertible portion into equity shares
rules.failReason: fun _ => "The value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten crore rupees, and the issuer has determined the conversion price but holders have not been given the option to not convert."

rules.title: Warrant tenure ≤ 18 months
rules.failReason:
fun i => "Warrant tenure exceeds 18 months.",
    remedy? := some "Adjust warrant tenure to be less than or equal to 18 months."

rules.title: Warrant exercise price formula and upfront payment
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.warrant_exercise_price.isNone then "Warrant exercise price not provided." else "Upfront payment less than 25% of the exercise price.",
    remedy? := some "Provide a formula for determining the exercise price and ensure at least 25% of the consideration amount based on the exercise price is received upfront."

rules.title: Forfeiture of consideration for un-exercised warrants
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.warrant_tenure > 3 * 12 then "Warrant tenure exceeds 3 months." else "No warrant exercise price or upfront payment provided.",
    remedy? := some "Ensure the warrant tenure is less than or equal to 3 months and provide a warrant exercise price and upfront payment."

rules.title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20%
rules.failReason:
fun i => "Promoters' contribution is less than 20%.",
    remedy? := some "Increase promoters' contribution to at least 20% of the post-issue capital."

rules.title: Promoter contribution by equity shares or convertible securities
rules.failReason:
fun i => "Contribution method not provided.",
    remedy? := some "Specify whether the promoter contribution is made by equity shares or convertible securities."

rules.title: Undisclosed conversion price
rules.check: fun i => not (i.operating_profits.exists (fun x => x.length > 0) && i.promoter_securities_demat)
rules.failReason: "Promoters have not disclosed the conversion price or have no operating profits."

rules.title: Promoters' contribution computation
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations that cannot be represented in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.failReason: "The Issuer does not have any securities ineligible for minimum promoters' contribution."

rules.title: Promoters’ contribution computation
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations that cannot be represented in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Exercise of employee stock options or SARs
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations that cannot be represented in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired by promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.has_paid_for_promoter_securities x)
rules.failReason: fun i => "No payment for specified securities acquired by promoters.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired under Companies Act
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.payment_for_companies_act_securities x)
rules.failReason: fun i => "No payment for specified securities acquired under Companies Act.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Payment for specified securities in government company IPO
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.payment_for_govt_company_ipo x)
rules.failReason: fun i => "No payment for specified securities in government company IPO.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Specified securities allotted to promoters at a price less than issue price
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.lower_price_for_promoter_securities x)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities allotted to promoters at a price greater than issue price.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Lock-in of specified securities held by the promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.securities_held_by_promoters.map (fun x => i.lock_in_for_promoter_securities x)
rules.failReason: fun i => "No lock-in for specified securities held by promoters.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Promoter lock-in period (initial offer)
rules.check: fun i => i.lock_in_period == some 180 or (i.lock_in_period == none && i.issue_proceeds_capital_expenditure)
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.lock_in_period != some 180 then "Promoter lock-in period should be 18 months." else if i.lock_in_period != none && not i.issue_proceeds_capital_expenditure then "Lock-in period for promoters should be 3 years if majority of issue proceeds is for capital expenditure.", remedy? := some "Adjust lock-in period to comply with ICDR."

rules.title: Promoter excess holding lock-in (initial offer)
rules.check: fun i => i.lock_in_period == some 180 or (i.lock_in_period == none && i.issue_proceeds_capital_expenditure)
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.lock_in_period != some 180 then "Promoter excess holding lock-in period should be 6 months." else if i.lock_in_period != none && not i.issue_proceeds_capital_expenditure then "Lock-in period for promoter excess holding should be 1 year if majority of issue proceeds is for capital expenditure.", remedy? := some "Adjust lock-in period to comply with ICDR."

rules.title: Non-promoter lock-in (initial offer)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Lock-in period for equity shares held by persons other than promoters should be greater than zero."

rules.title: Exceptions to lock-in (employees and employee stock option trusts)
rules.failReason: "This rule does not apply to equity shares allotted to employees or held by an employee stock option trust."

rules.title: Lock-in for venture capital funds (initial offer)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Lock-in period for equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund should be greater than zero."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (a)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1) && i.is_loan_granted_to_issuer
rules.failReason: fun i => if not (i.locked_in_securities.length > 0) then "Specified securities not locked-in." else if not (i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1)) then "Only one specified security can be locked-in." else if not i.is_loan_granted_to_issuer then "Loan granted to issuer company is required."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (b)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1) && i.is_loan_terms
rules.failReason: fun i => if not (i.locked_in_securities.length > 0) then "Specified securities not locked-in." else if not (i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1)) then "Only one specified security can be locked-in." else "Pledge of specified securities is not one of the loan terms."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1) && not i.is_sr_equity_shares
rules.failReason: fun i => if not (i.locked_in_securities.length > 0) then "Specified securities not locked-in." else if not (i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x == 1)) then "Only one specified security can be locked-in." else "SR equity shares are excluded from pledge."

rules.title: Transfer of locked-in specified securities
rules.failReason: "Regulation 22 does not provide a machine-checkable compliance rule. Please consult the text for details."

rules.title: Rights, obligations and responsibilities of lead managers
rules.check: fun i => Option.some (i.lead_manager_roles).map (fun lmrs => lmrs.all (fun r => List.mem r i.lead_manager_roles))
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.lead_manager_roles == none then "No lead managers specified." else "Lead manager roles not predetermined and disclosed."

issuer_questions.question: What is the net tangible assets for each of the last three years?
What are the operating profits for each of the last three years?
What is the net worth for each of the last three years?
Is the dematerialised form of promoter's securities available?
Are there any partly paid-up equity shares?
What are the firm arrangements of finance for the project?
How long have the equity shares been held before offering them for sale?
What is the holding period for convertible securities and resulting equity shares?
Has the issuer defaulted on payment of interest or repayment of principal?
Has the issuer obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency?
Who are the debenture trustees appointed by the issuer?
Has the issuer created a debenture redemption reserve?
Has the issuer obtained positive consent from holders for the conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares?
Should holders of listed convertible debt instruments be given the option to not convert the convertible portion into equity shares?
Which securities are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution?
